scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npx tsx server/src/index.ts" "cd client && npx vite"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build:server && npm run install:client && npm run build:client && npm run db:push:maybe
scripts.db:push:maybe: node -e "if(process.env.DATABASE_URL){require('child_process').execSync('npx prisma db push --schema=server/src/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss',{stdio:'inherit'})}else{console.log('DATABASE_URL not set, skipping db push')}"
